reviews.comment:
Bien, baños limpios, un poco incómoda para ingresar.

(Translated by Google)
Okay, clean bathrooms, a little awkward to get in.

reviews.comment:
Hay demora en la atención, no te limpian los vidrios y no revisan el aceite y el agua

(Translated by Google)
There are delays in service, they don't clean the windows, and they don't check the oil and water.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3118761116116586620/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5bDRtek9BEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena experiencia. Los chicos de la playa y los del bar nos atendieron muy bien. Bastante limpio el lugar

(Translated by Google)
A very good experience. The beach staff and the bar staff treated us very well. The place was quite clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3118761116116586620/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5czZia3h3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Te atiende  bien mucha concurrencia

(Translated by Google)
You are well served by a large crowd
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3118761116116586620/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5LU56dEJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Estuve 10 minutos esperando que me atendieran (estaban ocupados cuando llegué) despues los empleados atendieron a los que llegaron después, una falta de respeto. Me fui sin cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
I waited 10 minutes to be served (they were busy when I arrived). After that, the employees served those who arrived later, which was disrespectful. I left without getting fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3118761116116586620/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5M19lT29BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención pero, si pagas con la aplicación de ypf no podes solicitar factura A. Cumple con los protocolos

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but if you pay with the YPF app, you can't request an A invoice. Follow the protocols.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3118761116116586620/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5N2FURUNBEAE
